title: Verify create and verify ledger backups contract
preconditions: A fresh representative local Ledger and the valid and invalid inputs required by FR-LEDGER-BACKUP-VERIFICATION are available.
steps: Invoke the relevant operations through the public CLI contract and exercise every acceptance criterion of FR-LEDGER-BACKUP-VERIFICATION.
expected: All FR-LEDGER-BACKUP-VERIFICATION acceptance criteria, including stable-error and no-partial-mutation outcomes, hold.
